pi_items.source: Computed mathematically using Python math.radians(51.508) based on the exact latitude given in the task description for the Globe Theatre.
Computed mathematically using Python math.radians(-0.097) based on the exact longitude given in the task description for the Globe Theatre.
Computed using Python astropy.time for the explicitly requested task date June 21, 2024 at 22:30 UTC.
Found explicitly defined as SCREENSHOT_DIR in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh scripts.
Found explicitly defined as NOTES_FILE in export_result.sh and requested in the task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task specifies real-world coordinates and time for the Globe Theatre, which are accurately mapped to the metadata: latitude 51.508° N is ~0.899 radians, longitude 0.097° W is ~-0.0017 radians, and June 21, 2024 at 22:30 UTC correctly converts to a Julian Date of 2460483.4375. The output expectations are also verified against the environment scripts (export_result.sh), confirming the screenshot directory is /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium and the text report path is /home/ga/Desktop/midsummer_lighting_notes.txt.
